title: Horkelia micheneri

It is often used in botanical studies and research due to its unique characteristics and adaptations.

intro: Horkelia micheneri, also known as Michener's horkelia, is a rare, perennial plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease.
